name: Filament Composer Release Notifier
description: Filament-first Composer visibility: compare composer.json / composer.lock with Packagist (default) or GitHub releases, dashboard widget, resource with “Check again”, optional email — informational only; run composer update in development.
features: Default Packagist p2 metadata (no GitHub token required for version checks)
Optional GitHub Releases + compare API mode
Filament resource with manual “Check again” sync
Login-triggered queue job with session guard
Browser compare links without GitHub API when using Packagist mode

screenshots.caption: Dashboard widget: tracked packages and how many are behind latest
Composer Packages resource with Check again and version columns
